falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a key resistance level from the bottom_2024_aug pattern) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a breakout contradicting the pattern's bearish implications, invalidating the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ (confirming a market top) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would directly contradict the current HOLD signal by confirming a market top rather than a continuation pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the Nasdaq 100 crosses above the 50-day moving average by 3% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bullish divergence in momentum indicators would falsify the HOLD signal by confirming a trend reversal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
